metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_3960
metadata.comment: Rationale: Fig 2B shows that rabconnectin-3 (in this paper identified as the same protein as WDR7), is selectively present in the synaptic vesicle fraction. Fig 2Bb shows that it is mainly present on synaptic vesicle fractions, fractions with more synaptic plasma membrane contain little rabconnectin-3. These findings are corroborated by immuno-electron microscopy, showing selective reactivity on synaptic vesicles. Similar data have been reported in the support reference.. Experimental description: Legends: "The homogenate of rat cerebra was subjected to subcellular fractionation." and "Immunoelectron microscopy of primary cultured rat hippocampal neurones."
